final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original cinematic still of a modern international metropolis core business district at night, captured from aerial perspective.

Style/medium: photorealistic drone aerial photography, long exposure technique, cyberpunk color grading with cinematic treatment
Composition: high-angle bird's-eye view, wide establishing shot capturing the entire city core, center-framed iconic supertall skyscraper as focal point, 24mm equivalent wide-angle perspective
Subject: signature supertall skyscraper with sweeping searchlight beams cutting through night sky, glass curtain walls reflecting city lights
Scene/backdrop: dense cluster of modern skyscrapers with illuminated glass facades, multi-level highway interchange with streaming traffic light trails (red tail lights and white headlights), distant harbor with docked mega cruise ships, massive neon billboards illuminating the sky
Lighting/mood: artificial city lights as primary source, searchlight beams from building top creating dramatic rays, high contrast between lit surfaces and deep shadows, moody and energetic urban atmosphere
Color palette: blue-violet tones as dominant base, cyan and magenta neon accents, warm amber and red from traffic trails, cool electric highlights against dark night sky
Materials/textures: reflective glass surfaces with colorful light reflections, smooth asphalt with light trails, metallic building structures, water surface in harbor
Constraints: must maintain long exposure light trail effect, cyberpunk aesthetic with blue-purple dominance, clear visibility of highway traffic flow patterns
Avoid: daylight elements, natural sunlight, low-angle shots, muted colors, film grain overdone, 8K stuffer labels
